title: Adolf Hitler becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Adolf Hitler was an Austrian-born German politician who was the dictator of Germany during the Nazi era from 1933 until his suicide in 1945.

title: Joseph Goebbels becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Paul Joseph Goebbels was a German politician and philologist who was the Gauleiter of Berlin, chief propagandist for the Nazi Party, and then Reich Minister of Propaganda from 1933 until his suicide in 1945.

title: Friedrich Merz becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Joachim-Friedrich Martin Josef Merz is a German politician who has served as Chancellor of Germany since 6 May 2025.

title: Angela Merkel becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Angela Dorothea Merkel is a German stateswoman and retired politician who served as Chancellor of Germany from 2005 to 2021.

title: Olaf Scholz becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Olaf Scholz is a German politician who served as the chancellor of Germany from 2021 to 2025.

title: Konrad Adenauer becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Konrad Hermann Joseph Adenauer was a German statesman and politician who served as the first chancellor of West Germany from 1949 to 1963.

title: Helmut Kohl becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Helmut Josef Michael Kohl was a German politician who served as chancellor of Germany and governed the Federal Republic from 1982 to 1998.

title: Willy Brandt becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Willy Brandt was a German politician and statesman who was leader of the Social Democratic Party of Germany (SPD) from 1964 to 1987 and concurrently served as the chancellor of West Germany from 1969 to 1974.

title: Gerhard Schröder becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Gerhard ("Gerd") Fritz Kurt Schröder is a German former politician and lobbyist who served as Chancellor of Germany from 1998 to 2005.

title: Helmut Schmidt becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Helmut Heinrich Waldemar Schmidt was a German politician and member of the Social Democratic Party of Germany (SPD), who served as the chancellor of West Germany from 1974 to 1982.

title: Kurt Georg Kiesinger becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Kurt Georg Kiesinger was a German politician and lawyer who served as the chancellor of West Germany from 1 December 1966 to 21 October 1969.

title: Ludwig Erhard becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Ludwig Wilhelm Erhard was a German politician and economist who served as the second chancellor of West Germany from 1963 until 1966.

title: Walter Scheel becomes chancellor of Germany
fact: Walter Scheel was a German statesman.
